summary: Focused on building and maintaining a crypto trading platform with AI models, developing various utility tools (file tagging, HID firmware, CV generation), and exploring AI/ML applications in trading, poker, and personal assistants. The work spans multiple languages and platforms, including SaaS, Android, embedded firmware, and desktop utilities.

items.title: Profile card generator and CV automation
items.description: Built a custom GitHub profile CV workflow generator producing timeline and sidebar cards.

items.title: Profile card rendering engine
items.description: Developed a card renderer that outputs combined profile SVG with light/dark theme support.

items.title: Crypto AI trading platform
items.description: Worked on a SaaS algorithmic crypto trading platform incorporating AI and neural network models.

items.title: Archived trading platform iteration
items.description: Maintained an archive version of the crypto trading platform with earlier model experiments.

items.title: FlClash proxy fork
items.description: Added XHTTP support to a Mihomo fork for the FlClash proxy client.

items.title: ESP32-S3 HID firmware
items.description: Continued work on feature-rich mouse and keyboard emulation firmware for ESP32-S3.

items.title: Crypto price prediction modeling
items.description: Researched and developed cryptocurrency price prediction models in Python.

items.title: TelePilot n8n node fork
items.description: Enhanced a Telegram automation node for n8n workflows, improving session handling and CI stability.

items.title: Windows file tagging utility
items.description: Polished and released v2 of the Windows Explorer file tagging tool, adding metadata support and Store submission.

items.title: Neovim IDE configuration
items.description: Maintained a personal Neovim setup with LSP, treesitter, and remote session improvements.

items.title: YOLO annotation tool
items.description: Built a lightweight, browser-based YOLO image labeling utility for personal projects.

items.title: Windows file tagging utility release prep
items.description: Prepared v2 release of the Windows Explorer file tagging tool for Microsoft Store submission.

items.title: Android LLM assistant
items.description: Worked on an Android assistant using large language models with on-device phone interaction capabilities.

items.title: AI coding agent
items.description: Built an autonomous multi-session AI coding tool for iterative development.

items.title: Freqtrade trading strategies
items.description: Developed custom algorithmic trading strategies for the Freqtrade bot framework.

items.title: TelePilot n8n node integration
items.description: Started the TelePilot2 n8n integration project with Docker deployment and session management.

items.title: Poker computer vision experiments
items.description: Explored computer vision techniques for analyzing online poker platform interactions.

items.title: Windows Explorer tagging utility v2
items.description: Worked on an enhanced version of the Windows file tagging tool with a polished UI and style improvements.

items.title: GitHub profile setup
items.description: Set up initial personal GitHub profile README with introductory content.

items.title: Windows file tagging utility launch
items.description: Released the first version of the Windows Explorer tagging tool with CLI and graphical interface.
